key_list: Hi. Please help me rank the following 15 itesm

text: of a space crew originally scheduled to rendezvous with another ship on the lighted surface of the moon. However, due to mechanical difficulties, your ship was forced to land at a spot some 200 miles (about 321 km) from the rendezvous point. During reentry and landing, much of the equipment aboard was damaged and, since survival depends on reaching the mother ship, the most critical items available must be chosen for the 200-mile trip. Below are listed the 15 items left intact and undamaged after landing. Your task is torank order them in terms of their importance for your crew in allowing them to reach the rendezvous point.
